name: Steak with Blue Cheese Dressing
recipeIngredient: 4 small New York strip or rib eye
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir cheese, garlic, wine, and red pepper over low heat, stirring frequently, until cheese is melted.
2. Keep warm.
3. Heat margarine in a 12-inch skillet until hot.
4. Cook beef steaks over medium-high heat, turning once, until medium doneness, about 5 minutes on each side.
5. Sprinkle with pepper. Remove from skillet and keep warm.
6. Add water to the skillet. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly to loosen browned bits.
7. Boil for 2 minutes.
8. Stir pan juices into cheese mixture. Pour over steaks.
9. Sprinkle with parsley.
NOTE: You can also use Roquefort cheese
